tools.name: Create_Or_Update_Subnet_Context_tool
tools.description: SM creates the network context for a new collaborative subnet, including allocation of a subnet ID.

parameters.name: agent_list
parameters.description: Agent ID list that have been connected to the subnet

parameters.name: subnet_specification
parameters.description: Number of agents that can be connected to the subnet.

tools.name: Create_Subnet_PDUSession_tool
tools.description: SM creates a PDU session connecting an agent to a subnet.

tools.name: Issue_Access_Token_tool
tools.description: Interacts with the IDM to generate an access token for an agent requiring entry into the subnet.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: New agent to be connected to the subnet

tools.name: Subscription_tool
tools.description: Queries UDM to validate whether a specified user or agent has subscribed to a particular network service capability.

parameters.name: service_type
parameters.description: ACN service type, e.g., SubnetAccess, SubnetCreate

tools.name: Validate_Access_Token_tool
tools.description: Interacts with IDM to validate whether a token is valid for a specified subnet.
